summary: Teach the scaffolder-generated sync envelope walker to recognize Relay's pageInfo wrapper and hasNextPage flag.
reason: GraphQL transport returns canonical Relay shape {nodes:[...], pageInfo:{hasNextPage, endCursor}}. sync.go's extractPaginationFromEnvelope already recurses into 4 wrapper objects but pageInfo was not one of them, and the hasMore key list did not include hasNextPage. Without this, sync terminates after page 1 against Jobber.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass; envelope walker now extracts endCursor from pageInfo.endCursor and hasMore from pageInfo.hasNextPage.
